motivo: código extraído mas apenas 5/6 seções presentes
resposta:
solution:
def distanceTraveled(mainTank: int, additionalTank: int) -> int:
    total_distance = 0
    while mainTank > 0 or additionalTank > 0:
        if mainTank >= 5:
            mainTank -= 5
            total_distance += 50
        else:
            additionalTank -= 5
            total_distance += 50
    return total_distance

efficiency: HIGH
time complexity: O(1)
space complexity: O(1)
energy implications: LOW
